steps.title: Identify the evidence role
steps.content: The passage first says not all animal information cascades are beneficial. The warbler study that follows gives a concrete example of a harmful cascade, so the transition should introduce confirming evidence.

steps.title: Reject mismatched transitions
steps.content: A signals substitution, B signals a response, and D adds a separate point. The warbler example instead supports the claim that cascades can be harmful. The answer is C.
